data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a room scan (360 camera view), which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or execution of this requirement. The absence of any API reads or persisted state checks related to the room scan indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of room scan (360 camera view) implementation or validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for room scan implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API calls and checks that verify the room scan requirement.
